## Problem

<!-- What user problem are you trying to solve? What's the current friction? -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What would you build? UI flow, protocol change, new endpoint, etc. -->

## Trust-model considerations

- [ ] No change to the wire protocol or threat model.
- [ ] Touches the wire protocol — please outline the security implications.
- [ ] Adds a new endpoint or Socket.IO event — please draft an `.repobility/access.yml` update.

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What did you rule out, and why? -->

## Scope

- [ ] Backwards compatible.
- [ ] Requires a wallet migration.
- [ ] Requires a relay protocol bump.
